title: Task: Verify & Close b9v P1 Fixes (build + smoke tests)
description:
Host verification gate for localmgr-b9v.1 through .5 (see each
issue's bd comment for the specific manual smoke test). Steps:
1. swift build -c release (or make build) succeeds with no new warnings from
   the touched files (LocalAPIGateway.swift, BackendRunnerManager.swift,
   ModelCatalogService.swift).
2. make run / Xcode run, then work through each b9v.N comment's 'VERIFY ON
   HOST' checklist above.
3. If all pass: bd close localmgr-b9v.1 .2 .3 .4 .5 (see CLOSE SECTION below),
   then close this verify task, then close localmgr-b9v itself in a
   follow-up bd close (not bundled into this script -- see lifecycle note).
4. If something fails: bd comment the specific failure on the relevant
   b9v.N issue and leave it open; do not close b9v.1-.5 wholesale if only
   one fix has a problem.

title: Task: Offload Catalog Directory Scanning & Header Parsing to Background Task
description: REL-1: Move synchronous FileManager enumeration and GGUF header reading off @MainActor into a background task to prevent macOS UI beachballs.

comments.author: agent:container:implementer
comments.text:
Fixed (REL-1). ModelCatalogService.swift:
refreshCatalog() now snapshots 'folders' synchronously (unchanged call-site
semantics/signature -- still fire-and-forget, not async) and runs the actual
FileManager enumeration + GGUFHeaderParser.inspect work via
Task.detached(priority: .userInitiated) calling new nonisolated private
static scanFolders(_:)/calculateFolderSize(_:), then hops back via
'await MainActor.run { self?.models = scanned }' to publish the result. No
call sites changed (app launch, folder add, manual refresh, post-download all
still just call refreshCatalog()).
VERIFY ON HOST: point the vault at a folder with many/large GGUF files and
confirm the UI (window drag, sidebar clicks) stays responsive during a
refresh (manual refresh button and adding a new folder), instead of
beachballing.

title: Task: HTTP Request Payload Framing & Size Limits in LocalAPIGateway
description: SEC-2: Implement HTTP request framing inspecting Content-Length and enforcing a 10MB payload cap instead of assuming requests fit in a single 64KB TCP packet.

comments.author: agent:container:implementer
comments.text:
Fixed (SEC-2). LocalAPIGateway.swift: replaced the single fixed
'connection.receive(minimumIncompleteLength: 1, maximumLength: 65536)' read
with a new receiveRequest(connection:buffer:) that recurses across as many
TCP reads as needed, parses headers once \r\n\r\n is found, honors
Content-Length to know when the body is fully buffered, and enforces a new
private static let maxRequestBytes = 10MB cap (413 + connection.cancel() if
exceeded). Added an extractHeaderValue(_:from:) helper (also reused by the
new CORS logic in b9v.1).
VERIFY ON HOST: send a >64KB (but <10MB) POST body to
/v1/chat/completions (e.g. a very long prompt) and confirm it's no longer
truncated/mis-parsed; send a >10MB body and confirm a clean 413 instead of a
hang or crash; confirm ordinary small GET/POST requests (existing behavior)
are unaffected.

title: Task: Fix Subprocess Readability Handler CPU Loop on Exit
description: RACE-2: Clear pipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = nil in stopCurrent() and terminationHandler to prevent 100% CPU spinning upon runner exit.

comments.author: agent:container:implementer
comments.text:
Fixed (RACE-2). BackendRunnerManager.swift: the readabilityHandler
closure now checks 'guard !data.isEmpty else { handle.readabilityHandler = nil;
return }' at the top -- an empty read is EOF, and this is the standard fix for
the well-known Pipe/FileHandle CPU-spin-on-EOF gotcha. Also nils the handler
(via self.pipe) inside terminationHandler and in stopCurrent(), so it's
cleared on every exit path, not just EOF.
VERIFY ON HOST: start a model, stop it (or let it exit/crash), and watch
Activity Monitor / 'top' for LocalMgr's CPU immediately after -- should drop
to ~0%, not spin.

title: Task: Guard BackendRunnerManager 2s Fallback Status Timer
description: RACE-1: Check self.currentProcess === process and status == .starting before setting status to .running in delayed timer callback.

comments.author: agent:container:implementer
comments.text:
Fixed (RACE-1). BackendRunnerManager.swift: the 2s
DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter fallback-status closure now guards on
'self.currentProcess === process' (identity), not just status/isRunning, so a
stop+restart within that 2s window can no longer let a stale timer flip
.running for the wrong session. The terminationHandler's cleanup
(currentProcess/activeModel/pipe = nil) is similarly gated on
'self.currentProcess === proc' for the same reason.
VERIFY ON HOST: rapidly start a model, stop it, and start a different model
within ~2 seconds (a few times) -- confirm the status badge/Live Logs never
end up misattributed to the wrong model, and the correct one ends up
.running.

title: Epic: Security, Concurrency & Reliability Audit Remediation
description: Remediating security vulnerabilities (loopback binding, CORS), race conditions (process status timers, EOF CPU spinning), main-thread disk I/O freezes, and resource leaks.

title: Task: Restrict LocalAPIGateway Binding to Loopback (127.0.0.1) & Restrict CORS
description: SEC-1: Set NWParameters.requiredLocalEndpoint = NWEndpoint.Host('127.0.0.1') in LocalAPIGateway to prevent local network exposure and restrict wildcard CORS headers.

comments.author: agent:container:implementer
comments.text:
Fixed (SEC-1). LocalAPIGateway.swift: startListening() now sets
parameters.requiredLocalEndpoint = NWEndpoint.hostPort(host: "127.0.0.1", port: listenerPort)
before creating the NWListener, restricting the bind to loopback instead of all
interfaces. sendHTTPResponse(...) gained an allowedOrigin: String? = nil param;
the previous hardcoded 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' is gone. A new
allowedCORSOrigin(from:) helper reflects the request's Origin header back only
when its host is 127.0.0.1/localhost/::1 (any port); every other Origin gets no
CORS header at all. Threaded allowedOrigin through processHTTPRequest and all 4
handler functions (handleModelsList/handleStats/handlePrometheusMetrics/
handleChatCompletions) and their ~13 sendHTTPResponse call sites.
VERIFY ON HOST: after 'make build && make run' (or Xcode run), confirm
'curl http://127.0.0.1:4891/v1/models' still works, and (if you have a second
device on the same LAN) confirm it can no longer reach the gateway at all.
Also confirm a same-origin fetch (e.g. a page served from 127.0.0.1) still
gets Access-Control-Allow-Origin back, and a fetch with an arbitrary Origin
header (curl -H 'Origin: https://evil.example') gets no such header.

title: Task: Increase Reverse Proxy URLSession Timeout for Long Completions
description: Configure LocalAPIGateway URLSession timeout from default 60s to 1800s (30m) so max_tokens=2048+ generations never timeout.

title: Bug: Version string mismatch across Settings panel and app Info pane
description: Ensure version displayed in Settings panel matches Info.plist (v0.2.0) and SidebarView info pane.

title: Enhance GGUFHeaderParser for precise KV Cache and tensor memory footprint calculation
description: Parse GGUF tensor counts and layer dimensions to compute exact RAM/VRAM pressure for various context lengths before model load.

title: Integrate Engine Readiness Badges in UI and prevent unready model execution
description: Display clear '🟢 Ready' vs '🔴 Missing Engine: mlx_lm.server' badges on model cards in ModelListView and ModelInspectorView.

title: Epic: User Journey 1 — Core Discover, Precise Fit & Engine Readiness
description: Deliver complete user journey for discovering local models, calculating exact RAM/VRAM memory pressure from file weights, and identifying prerequisite execution engine readiness (llama-server, mlx_lm.server).

title: Implement EngineReadinessService to detect installed CLI binaries and environments
description: Scan system PATH, Homebrew, conda, and App Support for llama-server, mlx_lm.server, kokoro, and hf binaries on launch. Provide component status dashboard.

title: Implement BackendRunnerManager and Subprocess Orchestrator
description: Build BackendRunnerManager to orchestrate llama-server and mlx_lm subprocesses with port management and pipe forwarding.

title: Build 3-Column NavigationSplitView UI and MenuBarExtra
description: Construct main SwiftUI interface adhering to macOS HIG with sidebar, model list, inspector, and MenuBarExtra.

title: Implement ModelCatalogService and GGUF Header Parser
description: Implement ModelCatalogService with Security-Scoped Bookmarks and pure Swift GGUF header metadata inspection.

title: Implement SystemMonitorService for Apple Silicon Telemetry
description: Create SystemMonitorService querying mach host stats and Metal working sets for Predictive Fit Scores.

title: Scaffold LocalMgr macOS SwiftUI App
description: Initialize and build out standalone native macOS SwiftUI app (LocalMgr) with SPM structure, Makefile, services, and UI.

title: Initialize SPM Package.swift, Makefile, and App Entrypoint
description: Create Package.swift targeting macOS 14+, Makefile with release/app bundling, and LocalMgrApp entrypoint.

title: Task: Mutually Exclude Concurrent On-Demand Model Launches
description: RACE-3: Protect model auto-launching in LocalAPIGateway with a lock/queue to prevent duplicate runner subprocesses.

title: Task: Implement SSE Streaming Byte Forwarding in Gateway
description: REL-4: Forward streaming response bytes directly to NWConnection for stream:true completion requests.

title: Task: Cap logOutput Character Threshold to Prevent Memory Inflation
description: REL-2: Truncate logOutput buffer in BackendRunnerManager to last 100,000 characters to prevent memory growth and text rendering lag.

title: Task: Release Security-Scoped Bookmarks with stopAccessing
description: SEC-3: Pair startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() with stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() to prevent handle leaks.

title: Task: Fix Curated Model Catalog 404 Download Paths
description: Update curatedCatalog in HubDownloaderService.swift to point to verified Hugging Face repository IDs (unsloth/North-Mini-Code-1.0-GGUF, bartowski/gemma-2-9b-it-GGUF, bartowski/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-GGUF) and exact weight filenames to resolve HTTP 404 download errors.

title: Task: Surface Exact Inspection Errors in HubDiscoveryView UI
description: Update HubDiscoveryView to display hfClient.errorMessage with a warning icon when repoFiles is empty instead of hardcoded text.

title: Task: Actionable Gated Model Error Messages
description: Refine httpErrorMessage in HubDownloaderService and HuggingFaceAPIClient to explicitly report invalid/expired tokens vs unaccepted license terms on huggingface.co.

title: Epic: Hugging Face Auth Fallback & Error Surfacing
description: Resilient handling of expired/invalid HF tokens via unauthenticated retries for public models, distinct 401/403 gated model errors, and transparent UI presentation.

title: Task: Unauthenticated Retry Fallback for HF Public Repos
description: Automatically retry tree listing and file downloads without Authorization header when Bearer token returns HTTP 401 or 403, preventing expired tokens from blocking public models.

title: Task: Add Close Button to Ops Telemetry Dashboard Sheet
description: Add an explicit dismiss/done toolbar button in OpsDashboardView modal sheet.

title: Task: Interactive Gateway Speedometer to Open Ops Dashboard
description: Make the tok/s TTFT speedometer in SidebarView clickable to directly open OpsDashboardView.

title: Epic: Pragmatic Usage Polish & Gateway Timeout Fixes
description: Addressing real-world user feedback: HF Hub repo file resolution, removing external SSD docs confusion, interactive speedometer, Ops sheet close button, and 30-minute gateway HTTP proxy timeouts for large token completions.

title: Task: Fix HF Hub Repo File Tree Resolution (Gated / Subfolders)
description: Ensure HubDiscoveryView shows downloadable files even when weights reside in repo subfolders or require HF_TOKEN auth.

title: Epic: Enterprise Ops Telemetry Dashboard & Persistent History (CUJ-6)
description: Persistent proxy metrics storage (history.jsonl) and an interactive UI dashboard aggregating lifetime requests, tokens, TTFT, TPS, and KV hit rates per model.

title: Feature: Folder Refresh, cURL Docs, Process Auto-Terminate on Quit, and Clean Log Reset
description: Add manual catalog refresh button and shortcut, README curl proxy docs, AppSettings toggle and applicationWillTerminate hook for runner shutdown, and clear logs/ping on new runner start.

title: Feature: macOS HIG Compliance Fixes (Global Menus, Dock Actions, Shortcuts, Focus)
description: Implement CommandMenu('Models'), NSApplicationDelegate Dock menu, Cmd+. execution interrupt shortcut, and auto-focus search in Hub sheet.

title: Add Configurable Default Download Directory in Settings and Vault Selector
description: Set default storage to ~/Library/Application Support/LocalMgr/Models/ with Settings window override and per-download vault destination picker.

title: Documentation: Update Architecture Blueprint, Diagram, CUJs, and README for CUJ-4
description: Document CUJ-4 in docs/USER_JOURNEYS.md, update Graphviz architecture diagram, and refresh README.

title: Build Hub Discovery Panel with Predictive Memory Fit Warnings
description: Create dedicated modal sheet / panel allowing keyword search, URL paste, format filtering, and pre-download RAM fit badges.

title: Implement Global Background Downloader with Toolbar & MenuBar Progress
description: Enable multi-gigabyte transfers to continue when panel is closed, displaying live progress bar, speed, and ETA in main toolbar and MenuBarExtra.

title: Epic: User Journey 4 — Hugging Face Hub Discovery & Background Downloader
description: Deliver full CUJ for finding, inspecting, filtering, and downloading new models from Hugging Face Hub with memory fit warnings and background transfer indicator.

title: Implement HuggingFaceAPIClient for search, repo file inspection, and format classification
description: Query https://huggingface.co/api/models with search/filter tags (GGUF, MLX, TFLite, ONNX) and inspect file trees.

title: Feature: Dynamic API Gateway Port Rebinding from Settings
description: Connect AppSettings.gatewayPort to LocalAPIGateway so changing the port in Settings automatically rebinds NWListener without restarting LocalMgr.

title: Feature: In-App Minimal Model Playground & Health Tester
description: Add Quick Test tab in ModelInspectorView to send a 64-token ping verifying model generation before connecting external IDEs.

title: Feature: App Settings Panel (Cmd+,) with Hardware Auto-Tuning Opt-Out
description: Create native macOS Settings window allowing users to toggle Hardware Auto-Tuning, configure default context sizes, and manage idle timers.

title: UX: Clicking Active Runner in Sidebar selects model in Inspector Panel
description: Wrap Active Runner row in SidebarView with onTapGesture setting catalog.selectedModel to runner.activeModel so user can jump directly to live logs and info.

title: Feature: Filter Model List by Format and Engine (GGUF, MLX, LiteRT, Audio)
description: Add segmented picker or filter chips in ModelListView to allow users to quickly filter between GGUF, MLX Safetensors, LiteRT, and ONNX Audio models.

title: Integrate litert-lm readiness scanning and subprocess launcher
description: Update EngineReadinessService and BackendRunnerManager to detect and orchestrate litert-lm binary.

title: Epic: Google LiteRT-LM Model Hosting & Discovery
description: Add first-class support for Google AI Edge LiteRT (.tflite / .task) local model hosting via litert-lm engine.

title: Add LiteRT EngineType and .tflite model format scanning
description: Update ModelItem and ModelCatalogService to discover .tflite / .task files and classify them under LiteRT Engine.

title: Integrate Gateway Status Indicator and Controls in UI
description: Display live API Gateway status, active port, and request metrics in SidebarView and MenuBarView.

title: Implement Reverse Proxy Routing and On-Demand Engine Wake-Up
description: Proxy requests to BackendRunnerManager active port. If model requested differs or is stopped, trigger auto-start before streaming response.

title: Epic: User Journey 2 — Unified Local Gateway & Multi-Engine Swapping
description: Deliver built-in Swift HTTP server on port 4891 routing OpenAI-compatible requests to active engines with on-demand model warm-up.

title: Implement LocalAPIGateway HTTP Server on Port 4891
description: Create lightweight Swift HTTP socket listener on 127.0.0.1:4891 parsing GET /v1/models and POST /v1/chat/completions.

title: Feature: Apple Silicon Hardware Auto-Tuning Profiles
description: Detect hw.model and physical RAM to auto-configure optimal engine flags (-ngl 99, --flash-attn, thread/context limits) per M1/M2/M3/M4 tier.

title: Feature: Unified Local API Gateway & Reverse Proxy
description: Implement built-in Swift HTTP server on port 4891 routing /v1/chat/completions and /v1/models transparently to active engines with on-demand warm-up.

title: Feature: Idle VRAM Reclaiming & Emergency Pressure Release
description: Implement inactivity keep-alive TTL timers and DISPATCH_SOURCE_TYPE_MEMORYPRESSURE OS hooks to auto-unload models during high RAM pressure.

title: Task: Add VoiceOver Accessibility Labels to Status Badges
description: ACC-1: Annotate color status dots with accessibilityLabel and accessibilityValue modifiers.

title: Task: Remove External SSD Docs References
description: Update USER_GUIDE.md and USER_JOURNEYS.md to remove confusing external SSD/drive wording for BYOF vaults.

title: Epic: Spotlight-Style Global Quick Prompt Panel (CUJ-5)
description: Floating Raycast/Spotlight-style input panel accessible via global hotkey to send prompts to active LocalMgr proxy from any macOS app.

title: Task: Enhance /v1/models with Active Runner State
description: Inject active: true field into GET /v1/models payload for currently loaded engine.

title: Task: Create /v1/stats and /v1/health Telemetry Endpoints
description: Expose real-time JSON endpoint returning active model ID, memory fit score, request counts, and TTFT/TPS metrics.

title: Task: KV Cache Hit Rate & Prompt Optimization Tracker
description: Parse llama-server prompt_tokens_details to track prefix cache reuse and suggest context window adjustments.

title: Task: One-Click Model Matrix Benchmark Suite
description: Automated harness testing prompt eval and generation speeds across local vaults on exact host hardware.

title: Epic: Next-Gen Gateway Telemetry, Metrics & Benchmarks (CUJ-R2)
description: Implement real-time proxy inference metrics (TTFT, TPS), Apple Silicon energy tracking (tok/Wh), KV cache hit rates, and an automated prompt matrix benchmark suite.

title: Task: Real-Time Proxy Speedometer (TTFT & Tokens/Sec)
description: Intercept SSE data chunks in LocalAPIGateway to calculate time-to-first-token and live generation speed.

title: Task: Apple Silicon Energy Impact Gauge (Tokens per Watt-Hour)
description: Correlate active inference requests with kernel thermal state and GPU/Neural Engine power draw.

title: Feature: Embedded Chat Templates & Checksum Verification
description: Extract GGUF tokenizer.chat_template metadata and add streaming SHA-256 verification during Hugging Face chunked downloads.

title: Epic: Enterprise Ops & Hybrid Cloud Federation (CUJ-R3)
description: Scaling spectrum from DIY Local to DIY Hosted, aligning native metrics with Envoy AI Gateway standards and supporting containerized Envoy routing for hybrid macOS/GKE clusters.

title: Task: Envoy AI Gateway Prometheus Schema Alignment
description: Audit and adopt Envoy AI Gateway metric naming conventions (token accounting, TTFT histograms, error breakdowns) in LocalMgr telemetry.

title: Task: Managed Envoy Container Sidecar Profile
description: Provide an optional Ops deployment mode managing an Envoy AI Gateway container for seamless traffic routing between local Apple Silicon and remote GKE/K8s.

title: Roadmap: Track google/gemma.cpp for upstream Gemma 4+ model support
description: Monitor google/gemma.cpp repository for SIMD loader and kernel updates supporting Gemma 4+ architectures. Once released upstream, evaluate incorporating gemma.cpp as a specialized CPU reference runner.
